config.script:
#include "50200" 'qxx_publication #include "50217" 'realize publication #include "50518"
class cn5dokmag_oper_config public m_strName public m_cCreateTask
public m_cFillIdeal public m_eTypRej public m_cCollector
public m_idObjDPC_1 public m_idObjDPC_2
public m_cZakRezerw #ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL public m_cCreateWZ #endif
public sub class_initialize() m_strName = "" m_cCreateTask = "0" m_cFillIdeal = "0" m_cCollector = "0" m_idObjDPC_1 = 0 'no DP to perform m_idObjDPC_2 = 0 'no DP to perform m_cZakRezerw = "0" #ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL m_cCreateWZ = "0" #endif end sub
public property get is_empty() is_empty = (m_cCreateTask = "0") and _ (m_cCollector = "0") and _ (m_cZakRezerw = "0") and _ (m_cFillIdeal = "0") and _ (m_idObjDPC_1 = clng(0)) and _ #ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL (m_idObjDPC_2 = clng(0)) and _ (m_cCreateWZ = "0") #else (m_idObjDPC_2 = clng(0)) #endif end property
public sub load_from_string(byref strConfig) dim aItems : aItems = split(strConfig, vbTab) 'db4 - ok if ubound(aItems) > 4 then m_strName = aItems(0) m_cCreateTask = left(aItems(1),1) m_idObjDPC_1 = clng(aItems(2)) m_idObjDPC_2 = clng(aItems(3)) m_cFillIdeal = cstr(aItems(4)) m_cCollector = cstr(aItems(5)) end if
if ubound(aItems) > 5 then m_cZakRezerw = cstr(aItems(6)) end if
#ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL if ubound(aItems) > 6 then m_cCreateWZ = cstr(aItems(7)) end if #endif end sub
public function save_to_string #ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL save_to_string = doc_.afc.convert.formatter("%1"+vbTab+"%2"+vbTab+"%3"+vbTab+"%4"+vbTab+"%5"+vbTab+"%6"+vbTab+"%7"+vbTab+"%8") _ (m_strName)(cstr(m_cCreateTask))(cstr(m_idObjDPC_1))(cstr(m_idObjDPC_2))(cstr(m_cFillIdeal))(cstr(m_cCollector))(cstr(m_cZakRezerw))(cstr(m_cCreateWZ)).done() #else save_to_string = doc_.afc.convert.formatter("%1"+vbTab+"%2"+vbTab+"%3"+vbTab+"%4"+vbTab+"%5"+vbTab+"%6"+vbTab+"%7") _ (m_strName)(cstr(m_cCreateTask))(cstr(m_idObjDPC_1))(cstr(m_idObjDPC_2))(cstr(m_cFillIdeal))(cstr(m_cCollector))(cstr(m_cZakRezerw)).done() #endif end function
public sub show_config_page dim pPage : set pPage = doc_.getpagehli("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=THIS_FILE")
pPage.topelement.title = "Konfiguracja operacji """ + m_strName + """" #ifdef _DEBUG pPage.topelement.title = pPage.topelement.title + " - " + cstr(THIS_FILE) #endif
pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_CREATE_TASK).value = m_cCreateTask pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_SHOW_COLLECTOR).value = m_cCollector pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_ZAKREZERW).value = m_cZakRezerw #ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_CREATE_WZ).value = m_cCreateWZ #endif 'todo: otwieranie i wybór
dim strPubType : strPubType = "" select case m_eTypRej case N5REJESTRDOK__WZ strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_WZ" case N5REJESTRDOK__PZ strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_PZ" case N5REJESTRDOK__PW strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_PW" case N5REJESTRDOK__RW strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_RW" case N5REJESTRDOK__PP strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_PP" case N5REJESTRDOK__ZZ strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_ZZ" case N5REJESTRDOK__ZD strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_ZD" case N5REJESTRDOK__IR strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_IR" case N5REJESTRDOK__IP strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_IP" case N5REJESTRDOK__MM,N5REJESTRDOK__MR,N5REJESTRDOK__MP strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_MM" case N5REJESTRDOK__MP strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_MP" case N5REJESTRDOK__MR strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_MR" end select
setup_choose_dpc_pic pPage,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_1,CTRLID_DPC_1_PREVIEW,CTRLID_DPC_1,m_idObjDPC_1,strPubType setup_choose_dpc_pic pPage,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_2,CTRLID_DPC_2_PREVIEW,CTRLID_DPC_2,m_idObjDPC_2,strPubType setup_choose_dpc_label pPage,CTRLID_DPC_1,abs(m_idObjDPC_1) setup_choose_dpc_label pPage,CTRLID_DPC_2,abs(m_idObjDPC_2) setup_choose_dpc_preview pPage , CTRLID_DPC_1_PREVIEW , m_idObjDPC_1 setup_choose_dpc_preview pPage , CTRLID_DPC_2_PREVIEW , m_idObjDPC_2
if pPage.domodalauto() = CMD_CHOICE then m_cCreateTask = pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_CREATE_TASK).value m_cCollector = pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_SHOW_COLLECTOR).value m_cZakRezerw = pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_ZAKREZERW).value #ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL m_cCreateWZ = pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_CREATE_WZ).value #endif m_idObjDPC_1 = get_choosen_dpc(pPage,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_1,CTRLID_DPC_1_PREVIEW) m_idObjDPC_2 = get_choosen_dpc(pPage,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_2,CTRLID_DPC_2_PREVIEW) end if end sub public sub perform_operation(byref pObject , byref pPage) perform_operation_on_config Me, pObject , pPage end sub end class
class cn5dokmag_dok_config private m_aOperations(COUNT_OPERATIONS_INX) public m_eTypRej
public sub class_initialize() dim i for i = 0 to COUNT_OPERATIONS set m_aOperations(i) = new cn5dokmag_oper_config next end sub
public function is_empty(byval nNumOper) dim pOperConf:set pOperConf = m_aOperations(nNumOper) is_empty = pOperConf.is_empty end function
public sub setTypeRej(eTypRej) m_eTypRej = eTypRej dim i for i = 0 to COUNT_OPERATIONS m_aOperations(i).m_eTypRej = m_eTypRej next end sub
public sub init_with_defaults(nTypRej) dim i for i = 0 to COUNT_OPERATIONS set m_aOperations(i) = new cn5dokmag_oper_config next
setTypeRej nTypRej
select case nTypRej case N5REJESTRDOK__PZ m_aOperations(2).m_strName = "Wydruk PZ" 'todo: wyszukanie publikacji: m_aOperations(1).m_idObjDPC_1 case N5REJESTRDOK__WZ m_aOperations(2).m_strName = "Wydruk WZ" 'todo: wyszukanie publikacji: m_aOperations(1).m_idObjDPC_1 case N5REJESTRDOK__PW m_aOperations(2).m_strName = "Wydruk PW" 'todo: wyszukanie publikacji: m_aOperations(1).m_idObjDPC_1 case N5REJESTRDOK__RW m_aOperations(2).m_strName = "Wydruk RW" 'todo: wyszukanie publikacji: m_aOperations(1).m_idObjDPC_1 end select end sub
public sub load_from_string(byref strConfig) dim aItems : aItems = split(strConfig, REJDOK_CONG_SEPARATOR) dim i dim last : last = ubound(aItems) if last > COUNT_OPERATIONS then last = COUNT_OPERATIONS end if for i = 0 to last m_aOperations(i).load_from_string aItems(i) next end sub
public function save_to_string dim strTotal : strTotal = "" dim i for i = 0 to COUNT_OPERATIONS strTotal = strTotal + m_aOperations(i).save_to_string() + REJDOK_CONG_SEPARATOR next save_to_string = strTotal end function
public property get operation_name(byval nOperNr) operation_name = m_aOperations(nOperNr).m_strName end property public property let operation_name(byval nOperNr,byref strName) m_aOperations(nOperNr).m_strName = strName end property
public sub show_config_page(byval nOperNr) m_aOperations(nOperNr).show_config_page end sub public sub perform_operation(nOperNr,byref pObject,byref pPage) #ifdef _DEBUG trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "DEBUG: " + cstr(operation_name(nOperNr)) #endif m_aOperations(nOperNr).perform_operation pObject , pPage end sub end class
function create_config_object(byref pRejestr) dim pNewConfig : set pNewConfig = new cn5dokmag_dok_config pNewConfig.setTypeRej pRejestr.eTyp set create_config_object = pNewConfig end function
'--------------------------- config page ------------------ function fok page_.result = CMD_CHOICE page_.goback end function
function fcancel page_.goback end function
'--------------------------- perform operation ------------------ private sub perform_operation_on_config(byref pConfig,byref pDokMag , byref pPage)
if not make_task_on_dokmag(pConfig.m_cCreateTask,pDokMag,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not make_publication_on_dokmag(pConfig.m_idObjDPC_1,pDokMag,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not make_publication_on_dokmag(pConfig.m_idObjDPC_2,pDokMag,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not FillFromCollector(pConfig.m_cCollector,pDokMag,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not create_korekta(pConfig.m_cZakRezerw,pDokMag,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not create_WZ(pConfig.m_cCreateWZ,pDokMag,pPage) then exit sub end if
end sub
function create_korekta(cKorekta, byref pDM, byref pPage):create_korekta = true
if cKorekta = "0" then exit function end if
create_korekta = false
if not pPage.std_fsave_external_with_saveobjects() then exit function end if
dim pUtil:set pUtil = doc_.getmodule(60226)
create_korekta = pUtil.create_korekta (pDM , N5REJESTRDOK_ZAK_REZERWACJI)
end function
function create_WZ(cWZ, byref pDM, byref pPage):create_WZ = true
if cWZ = "0" then exit function end if
create_WZ = false
if not pPage.std_fsave_external_with_saveobjects() then exit function end if
dim pUtil:set pUtil = doc_.getmodule(60226)
create_WZ = pUtil.create_WZ(pDM)
end function
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' wypełnia dokument magazynowy jeśli użytkownik wciśnie "wczytaj" ' albo wysyła bazę artykułów do kolektora '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- function FillFromCollector(idObjDPC, byref pDokMag, byref pPage)
FillFromCollector = doc_.getmodule(60194).FillFromCollector(idObjDPC, pDokMag, pPage)
end function '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' dodaje pozycje do dokumentu magazynowego '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- sub DokmagAddPoz(byref pDokMag,byval pProdukt,byval lp , byval ilosc, byval cena)
doc_.getmodule(60194).DokmagAddPoz pDokMag, pProdukt,lp , ilosc, cena
end sub '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- function make_task_on_dokmag(cCreateTask,byref pDokMag,byref pPage) : make_task_on_dokmag = true
if cCreateTask = "0" then exit function end if
if pPage.std_fsave_external_with_saveobjects() then make_task_on_dokmag = false end if
UnderConstruction end function
function make_publication_on_dokmag(idObjDPC,byref pDokMag , byref pPage) : make_publication_on_dokmag = true
if idObjDPC = 0 then exit function end if
if not pPage.std_fsave_external_with_saveobjects() then make_publication_on_dokmag = false exit function end if
if (not pDokMag.pKlient is nothing) and is_email_publication(idObjDPC) then make_publication_on_dokmag = (realize_email_publication(abs(idObjDPC),pDokMag,pDokMag.pKlient.strEmail,pDokMag.text,nothing) = 0) else make_publication_on_dokmag = (realize_publication(abs(idObjDPC),pDokMag,idObjDPC>0,nothing) = 0) end if end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_ALL,Konfiguracja,FORM_SPAN)
QXX_CHOOSE_PUBLICATION(CTRLID_DPC_1,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_1,CTRLID_DPC_1_PREVIEW,1)
QXX_CHOOSE_PUBLICATION(CTRLID_DPC_2,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_2,CTRLID_DPC_2_PREVIEW,1)
QXR_SEPARATOR(2)
#comment NEXTVERSION - wywalic hide
QXC_LABEL(Zdarzenia,1)
zapamiętaj zdarzenie
QXR_LABELED_CHECK(CTRLID_ZAKREZERW,,Zakończenie rezerwacji) QXR_LABELED_CHECK(CTRLID_SHOW_COLLECTOR,,Kolektor danych) #ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL QXR_LABELED_CHECK(CTRLID_CREATE_WZ,,Utwórz WZ) #endif
QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN) QXF_END
XFDIALOGBUTTONS
